name: Vain Betrayer
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｖａｉｎ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ヴェイン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>裏</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>うら</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>切</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>りの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>嘲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>笑</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When an opponent's Xyz Monster declares an attack: Activate this card by targeting the attacking monster. It cannot attack, also its effects are negated. While that monster is on the field, during each of your opponent's End Phases: Send the top 3 cards of the opponent's Deck to the Graveyard. When that monster leaves the field, destroy this card.
eff: When an opponent's Xyz Monster declares an attack: Activate this card by targeting the attacking monster. It cannot attack, also its effects are negated. While that monster is on the field, during each of your opponent's End Phases: Send the top 3 cards of the opponent's Deck to the Graveyard. When that monster leaves the field, destroy this card.

action: Sends from the top of your opponent's Deck to your opponent's Graveyard
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
attack: Prevents your opponent's monsters from attacking
